fields.name: RA
fields.description: Right ascension (J2000); positional accuracy typically better than 1 arcsec for point sources at the detection limit

fields.name: P(S)
fields.description: Probability that the source is spurious or a sidelobe; 76.3% of sources have values 0.00-0.05

fields.name: Fpeak
fields.description: Peak flux density from the elliptical Gaussian model fit

fields.name: RMS
fields.description: Local noise estimate at the source position

fields.name: Maj
fields.description: Deconvolved major axis (FWHM) of the source

fields.name: Min
fields.description: Deconvolved minor axis (FWHM) of the source

fields.name: Field Name
fields.description: Name of the coadded image containing the source
